overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a character in a futuristic spacesuit exploring a sci-fi space station. The character progresses through distinct zones—from an exterior walkway with space views through corridors with shifting colored lighting (teal, yellow, green, red)—suggesting a journey through different functional areas of an industrial facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior space station walkway with viewport to space

events.description: passing a small seated figure huddled against the corridor wall
slowing to stop and interact with the airlock door controls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the exterior corridor, observing the starfield and nebula through large viewport windows

notable_agents.action: small figure sitting huddled on the floor near the airlock door

entered.detail: large curved window revealing stars and purple nebula outside
grated metal flooring with safety markings along the exterior passage
metallic safety railings lining the edge of the walkway
heavy circular metal door with hydraulic locking mechanism at corridor end
red cylindrical fire safety unit mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow exterior corridor of a space station, with a vast starfield visible through large viewport windows. The environment is dimly lit with cool teal accent lighting. The character passes a small seated figure and approaches a heavy airlock door at the end of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional airlock corridor with warm emergency lighting

events.description: opening the airlock door and stepping from exterior walkway into interior corridor
ambient lighting shifts from dark teal to warm yellow as character enters new section

agents.ego_description: opening the heavy airlock and proceeding into the yellow-lit interior passage

entered.detail: narrow passage illuminated by warm yellow strip lights along the ceiling
linear yellow emergency lighting fixtures mounted on walls
reinforced metal doorway leading deeper into the station interior

segments.scene_description: The character opens the airlock and transitions into a narrow corridor bathed in warm yellow emergency lighting. The space viewport is no longer visible as the character moves deeper into the station's interior, approaching another bulkhead door at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment storage room with green emergency lighting

events.description: entering the storage room through the bulkhead door
lighting shifts from yellow to green emergency illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through the doorway into a storage area lined with equipment racks and supply containers

entered.detail: illuminated green safety lights mounted on walls and ceiling
tall metal shelving units holding various supplies
red and green rectangular supply cases on shelves
simple metal seating along the storage room walls
tall dark lockers for equipment storage against the far wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a storage room illuminated by green emergency lighting. Metal equipment racks line the walls holding red and green supply containers, while personnel lockers stand against the far wall. The environment suggests a functional equipment bay or staging area within the station.

scene_state.functional_zone: personnel locker room transitioning to red-lit control station

events.description: character turns around to survey the locker room environment
entering area with intense red emergency lighting and control panels

agents.ego_description: turning to observe the locker room surroundings, then proceeding toward the red-lit control area

entered.detail: dark metal lockers labeled with numbers 1, 2, 3 and Chinese characters
illuminated consoles with buttons and screens in the red-lit section
yellow triangular warning signs with black symbols

segments.scene_description: The character explores a personnel locker room with numbered storage units, turning to survey the space before moving into an adjacent area bathed in red emergency lighting. The final area features control panels and hazard signage, suggesting a critical systems monitoring station or emergency command post.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a space station that transitions from a serene exterior walkway into a series of increasingly urgent industrial interior zones. It begins along a narrow corridor under cool teal lighting, where a vast starfield is visible through large viewports as the character passes a seated figure toward a heavy airlock. As the airlock opens, the scene shifts into a narrow interior passage bathed in warm yellow emergency lighting, moving away from the views of space toward another bulkhead door. The camera then enters a functional storage bay illuminated in green, passing metal equipment racks and supply containers before moving through a personnel locker room. Finally, the environment shifts into a critical systems area saturated in red emergency lighting, featuring control panels and hazard signage.
